title: Mini Mortar and Pestle Set – WM Bartleet & Sons Small and Compact 7cm Pestle and Mortar Grinder Perfect for Crushing and Grinding Herbs and Spices with Ease – Made from Hard Wearing Porcelain
features: TRADITIONAL MINI MORTAR & PESTLE: Perfect for crushing and grinding small amounts of herbs, spices, and pills.
HIGH QUALITY: Iconic kitchen gadget for food preparation when making pastes, sauces, rubs, dressings, seasoning and more.
DURABLE AND HARDWEARING: Durable, robust, versatile and hard wearing, rolled edge for non-chip, ergonomic pouring lip, good grip pestle, smooth gloss glaze outer finish.
QUALITY VITRIFIED PORCELIAN: Dishwasher, Oven, Microwave and Freezer safe, easy to clean and store with other tableware items

WHAT IS THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN CERAMIC AND PORCELAIN? The major difference between ceramic and porcelain is the way it’s made. Both are made from a clay mixture that is fired in a kiln, but porcelain is made from more refined clay and is fired at higher temperatures. This makes it denser and more durable than ceramic.
description: From the manufacturer High0 quality vitrified porcelain, easy to clean, dishwasher, oven, microwave and freezer safe, Easily stored with other tableware Durable and hard wearing with rolled edge for non-chip WM Bartleet & Sons 1750 T364 Traditional Porcelain Mini Mortar & Pestle, Herb and Spice Grinder 7cm – White Premium quality white porcelain Our Wm Bartleet & Sons English designed white porcelain traditional mini mortar and pestle is the easy way to crush and grind herbs and spices. The perfect kitchen gadget for food prep when making pastes, sauces, seasoning, pesto, dressings and much more. Looks beautiful on the kitchen shelf. This high-quality robust grinding set has an ergonomic pestle handle to be comfortable during use. 1 Traditional Mini Mortar & Pestle 7cm NOTE: This is a Mini Mortar & Pestle Premium Quality 100% Porcelain, easy to clean, Dishwasher, Freezer and Microwave safe. Iconic tiny kitchen gadget Perfect for grinding herbs spices or pills and for making pastes, sauces, seasoning, pesto, dressings. Stylish traditional design Featuring mortar bowl pouring lip and a solid flat base for easy grinding and crushing. Durable, versatile and hard-wearing classic kitchen crockery item, the rolled edge means no chips, an essential traditional kitchenware item Premium quality White porcelain Durable and versatile serve ware, classical White porcelain Mortar & Pestle, great for home and catering use, smooth gloss glaze finish. WM Bartleet & Sons Manufacturers of beautiful porcelain items for the home and kitchen. As found in the best stores and cookshops in England.
